response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 20 years of solid software engineering experience and technical leadership through teaching and open source work, they lack the strategic AI expertise and demonstrated AI products the role explicitly requires. Recent exposure to AI infrastructure (1 month) is too preliminary, and their career shows broad technical depth rather than the specialized focus on AI strategy needed for a director-level position advising customers on cutting-edge AI/cloud technologies.
strengths: 20 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrated technical leadership through speaking engagements (FOSS4G), teaching workshops, and maintaining open source projects used in production (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent pivot to AI infrastructure and MCP development shows awareness of emerging technologies
concerns: AI/ML expertise is extremely recent (1 month into current role) with no prior demonstrated AI products or strategic leadership in this domain
No Master's degree or formal AI/ML education despite role's preference for advanced credentials
Currently Staff-level engineer with unclear director-level individual contributor experience or strategic customer advisory background

key_factors.factor: AI strategy expertise and demonstrated products
Technical innovation and leadership track record
